summary: Complete frontend UI/UX redesign verification for Appeal Case Manager. All redesigned pages tested: AuthModal, ContactPage, Statistics, TermsOfService, SuccessStories. Deep Indigo & Burnished Amber color scheme verified. All pages render without critical errors. Dark mode toggle works across all pages and persists. All navigation links functional.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning only, not user-facing)

passed_tests: AuthModal - branded header with Scale icon and gradient background
AuthModal - amber gradient submit button styling
AuthModal - form inputs with data-testid attributes (auth-email-input, auth-password-input, auth-name-input)
AuthModal - Terms of Service and Privacy Policy links in footer
ContactPage - hero section with MessageSquare icon and gradient styling
ContactPage - form fields with data-testid (contact-name, contact-email, contact-subject, contact-message)
ContactPage - amber gradient submit button
ContactPage - navigation header with Legal Terms, FAQ, Forms links
ContactPage - theme toggle button works
Statistics page - hero section with BarChart3 icon
Statistics page - 4 stat cards displaying data (55 Total Cases, 113 Documents, 34 Reports, 138 Grounds)
Statistics page - Cases by Offence Type bar chart with data
Statistics page - Cases by State bar chart with data
Statistics page - Most Common Appeal Grounds list
Statistics page - Ground Strength Distribution (Moderate: 73, Strong: 33, Weak: 32)
TermsOfService - hero section with FileText icon
TermsOfService - collapsible sections expand/collapse correctly (tested sections 1, 3, 6)
TermsOfService - Section 4 'Important: Not Legal Advice' always visible with amber highlight
TermsOfService - Section 5 AI Technology Disclaimer always visible with blue highlight
TermsOfService - Section 7 Confidentiality Warning always visible with red highlight
TermsOfService - Section 15 Acknowledgment always visible at bottom
SuccessStories - hero section with 5 star ratings
SuccessStories - 'Real Stories, Real Hope' label
SuccessStories - 4 story cards with quote icons
SuccessStories - emerald-colored outcome badges with CheckCircle icons
SuccessStories - timeframe badges on story cards
SuccessStories - 'Share Your Story' section with form
Dark mode toggle works on all pages
Dark mode persists when navigating between pages
Navigation to Legal Terms (Glossary) works
Navigation to FAQ works
Navigation to Forms works
Navigation to Contact works
Navigation to Success Stories works
All pages render without JavaScript errors
Crimson Pro font used for headings
Manrope font used for body text
critical_code_review_comments: UI redesign successfully implemented across all tested pages
Consistent Deep Indigo (#1E1B4B) and Burnished Amber (#B45309) color scheme applied
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Dark mode implementation working correctly with theme persistence
Collapsible sections in TermsOfService page work as expected
Story cards on SuccessStories page display nicely with outcome badges
test_credentials: N/A - No login required for tested pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX redesign verification complete. All pages use consistent Deep Indigo (#1E1B4B) and Burnished Amber (#B45309) color scheme with Crimson Pro (headings) and Manrope (body) fonts. Statistics page displays real data from API. TermsOfService has working collapsible sections with ChevronDown animation. SuccessStories shows 4 featured stories with emerald outcome badges. Dark mode works across all pages and persists via ThemeContext. All navigation links in header work correctly.
